Regression on Number of Platforms

Katsuhiro Komatsu

2021-06-13

  • Regress wages, fees, etc. on the number of platforms in each commuting zone (CZ).
  • Restrict sample to ippan establishments.
  • Use the number of platforms in the previous year.
  • Year FE + Firm FE + Commuting zone FE are controlled.
  • IV is the sum of \(N\) in adjacent commuting zones.
  • Standard errors are clustered at community zone level.
  • Other control variables are
    • Number of firms in each industry (major classification)
    • Labor force in each age range (15-19, 20-24, …)
    • Indicator variables that takes 1 if a establishment paid wages for a particular type of work
    • Indicator for hiring daily workers
    • Indicator for providing temp-to-perm hiring offers
    • Indicator for overasea dispatching
    • Indicator for employment placement services

Test
